Pro-active customer concern and correction of issues in consultation with the Global Medical Indication Lead During initial review of protocol, consults with internal groups and support staff regarding procedural and budgetary items and the necessity for change due to any subsequent protocol amendments. Acquires other functions’ dedication to close gaps and address issues timely and effectively. Serves as chief liaison between sponsor and all PPD, part of Thermo Fisher Scientific internal departments performing the required tasks during all study phases. Educates Investigator sites by delivering a protocol specific lab procedures presentation and demonstration during an investigator meeting. Controls, handles and follows day to day activities during the course of the clinical trial to resolve any issues and answer queries Medical point of contact for all internal and external stakeholders: Interact with the investigators as needed, answer questions of IRBs and Health Authorities, prepare and present material to the study executive and independent safety committee if applicable; medical training of site staff at Investigator meetings; CRA training in new indications Ensure study compliance for all medical aspects by understanding and applying all relevant SOPs and GCP Closely collaborate with the cross functional study team members in order for medical risks, issues, and results to be clear to all involved parties Education MD, MB/BS or equivalent degree and strong medical knowledge, shown clinical experience running Neurology patients in hospital practice. Wenn wir deine Neugierde geweckt haben und du an einer Kooperation mit uns interessiert bist, freuen wir uns über deine Kontaktaufnahme und Zusendung deines Dozierenden-Profils samt Nachweisen. unsere benefits für dich Remote Work: Du kannst deutschlandweit zu 100 % mobil arbeiten. jobs.title: Administrative Support
jobs.description: About CloudWalk : We are not just another fintech unicorn. We are a pack of dreamers, makers, and tech enthusiasts building the future of payments. With millions of customers and a hunger for innovation, we're now expanding our neural network - literally and metaphorically. We’re looking for an Apprentice to join our dynamic team. This is an opportunity to gain hands-on experience in a fast-moving legal and compliance environment while working with a cutting-edge company. If you’re a proactive learner, excited about technology, and eager to develop administrative and operational skills in the legal field, this is your chance to grow with us. What You’ll Be Doing: Assist in managing and updating internal records and legal documentation in compliance systems. Support the registration, organization, and archiving of legal documents and reports. Aid in responding to official requests, notifications, and legal inquiries under supervision. Collaborate with internal teams to ensure accurate and timely documentation processing. Leverage AI tools and automation platforms to streamline legal and administrative workflows. Participate in training sessions to develop a foundational understanding of legal operations and fintech regulations. Maintain confidentiality and compliance with legal and regulatory requirements. What You Need to Succeed: Currently enrolled in high school or a technical/professional education program, meeting the criteria for an apprenticeship. Strong organizational and analytical skills with attention to detail. Interest in technology, automation, and AI-driven workflows. Basic proficiency in digital tools such as Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive) and willingness to learn legal tech platforms. Ability to communicate effectively and collaborate in a dynamic, fast-paced environment. Curiosity and willingness to learn about fintech, compliance, and legal processes. Advanced/ Fluent english Nice to Haves: Exposure to low-code/no-code automation tools or willingness to explore them. Interest in legal operations, compliance, or fintech-related topics. The Future We See: At CloudWalk , we believe AI and automation will redefine the way businesses operate: Legal teams streamlining operations with AI-enhanced document processing and compliance tracking. Automated workflows optimizing efficiency and accuracy in legal operations. Digital-first processes enabling real-time decision-making and risk assessment. A new era where legal and regulatory compliance is seamlessly integrated into business growth strategies. This is just the beginning. Together, we’ll build the future of legal operations—smarter, faster, and more automated than ever.Are you ready to start your journey with us? Join us at CloudWalk , where we’re not just engineering solutions; we’re building a smarter, AI-driven future for payments—together. By applying for this position, your data will be processed as per CloudWalk 's Privacy Policy that you can read here in Portuguese and here in English. Originally posted on Himalayas

jobs.title: SIOP Coordinator (m/f/d) – HVAC Europe
jobs.description: Über Carrier Carrier Global Corporation, ein weltweit führendes Unternehmen für intelligente Klima- und Energielösungen, engagiert sich für Innovationen, die Komfort, Sicherheit und Nachhaltigkeit in den Alltag bringen. Durch modernste Entwicklungen in Bereichen wie Temperaturregelung, Luftqualität und Transport verbessern wir das Leben der Menschen, unterstützen kritische Branchen und gewährleisten den sicheren Transport von Lebensmitteln, lebensrettenden Medikamenten und mehr. Seit der Erfindung der modernen Klimaanlage im Jahr 1902 verfolgen wir ein klares Ziel: das Leben der Menschen und unsere gemeinsame Welt zu verbessern. Unsere führende Position verdanken wir unserer erstklassigen, inklusiven Belegschaft, die den Kunden in den Mittelpunkt stellt. Weitere Informationen finden Sie unter corporate.carrier.com oder folgen Sie Carrier in sozialen Medien @ Carrier . Build a Career with Confidence We are looking for an experienced SIOP Coordinator (m/f/d) – HVAC Europe to join our team in Germany (remote, supporting our Allendorf site). In this role, you will be responsible for the end-to-end Sales, Inventory & Operations Planning (SIOP) process for one of our HVAC brands across Europe. Acting as the key interface between Sales, Supply Chain, Manufacturing, and Finance, you will ensure the optimal balance between customer demand, supply capa bilities, and business objectives. Location to choose (remote) Germany or France Your Responsibilities Own and manage the end-to-end SIOP process for an HVAC brand across Europe, including revenue realization, service levels, backlog, and working capital. Lead the monthly SIOP cycle and prepare decision-making materials covering demand, capacity, and inventory developments. Monitor and analyze key performance indicators such as Forecast Accuracy, Forecast Bias, OTIF, inventory levels, and order backlog, while driving continuous improvement initiatives. Collaborate closely with Sales, Supply Chain, Manufacturing (Europe and Asia), and Finance to ensure aligned planning and successful execution of business objectives. Translate mid- and long-term SIOP plans into operational execution (S&OE) and manage escalations related to critical supply or demand issues. Your Profile: 5–10 years of professional experience in SIOP, Demand Planning, Supply Planning, or Integrated Business Planning. Experience in an international manufacturing environment, ideally within the HVAC industry or a comparable industrial sector. Strong understanding of distributor-based business models and indirect inventory and demand management. Excellent analytical and financial skills with the ability to assess planning decisions in terms of revenue, forecasting, and working capital. Strong knowledge of modern ERP and planning systems (e.g., SAP IBP, SAP APO). Fluent English language skills, both written and spoken. Benefits: Meaningful Work: Contribute to sustainable innovations that support the energy transition. Modern Work Environment: Enjoy a permanent position within a successful global company where innovative technologies meet a collaborative workplace culture. Professional Development: Take advantage of a wide range of technical and personal development opportunities through the Viessmann Academy and external training partners. Retirement Benefits: Plan for your future with our company pension scheme. Sustainable Mobility: Benefit from attractive mobility programs, including partnerships such as Job Bike. Work-Life Balance: Receive 30 days of paid annual leave. Our Commitment to You Our people are our greatest asset. Their expertise, creativity, and passion drive our success. Every day, we strive to be an employer that attracts, develops, and retains exceptional talent. We are committed to creating an inclusive workplace where everyone feels they belong and where diversity and inclusion fuel innovation and growth. We provide rewarding career opportunities, value employee feedback, and continuously challenge o

jobs.description: 公司介绍 英国小型工作室/独立品牌，主产品是嵌入式蓝牙音频类电子产品，全员远程工作，时间自由 JD 我们在找一位经验扎实、硬件工程师，参与一系列嵌入式蓝牙、充电和音频类产品的开发，常驻广东优先 这是一个按项目、按小时合作的岗位，比较适合喜欢“动手解决问题”、愿意把想法真正做成产品的人。我们更看重工程落地能力，以及在有限空间里把设计做得干净、可靠、可量产 你会和我们一起从前期方案、器件选型，到原理图
